messages.content:
A potential customer wants to find out how blockchain can benefit their company and why they should use Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice.

Which factor describes the value of using Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


Accenture’s total number of employees worldwide


limited partnerships to keep ecosystems small and manageable


a universal solution that fits all clients equally


Accenture’s technology and operational experience with blockchain
Accenture’s technology and operational experience with blockchain.

Blockchain is often associated with Bitcoin and the financial services industry. However, it is applicable to almost every industry. The term Multi-party Systems better describes how the blockchain system is used.

What is a benefit of a Multi-party System?


More employees can be hired to process the data.


The system now owns the data and can share it as needed.


It can help businesses unlock the trapped value of their data.


Organizations who participate must share data from the same location.
It can help businesses unlock the trapped value of their data.

Accenture has put together a coalition of several ecosystem partners to implement the principles of blockchain and Multi-party Systems using varying technologies. One group of partners is referred to as MAAG.

Which companies are included in the MAAG group?


Morgan Stanley, Apple, Anheuser Busch, General Motors


MetLife, American Express, Alphabet Inc., General Electric


Microsoft, Amazon, Alibaba, Google


Mitsubishi, Agricultural Bank of China, Apple, Goldman Sachs
MetLife, American Express, Alphabet Inc., General Electric.

Which statement describes data-sharing in a blockchain?


Organizations share different versions of the same data on their local servers.


Organizations share a single version of data.


Organizations share only data related to money and finance.


Organizations share separate versions of data.
Organizations share a single version of data.

Accenture is a founding member of ID 2020.

What is the focus of this alliance?


supply chain


blockchain


financial services


digital identity
The focus of this alliance is digital identity.

Accenture's Multi-party Systems practice has three areas of focus. Two of these are Financial Services and Supply Chain.

Which is the third area of focus?


Utilities


Products


Automotive


Identity
The third area of focus is Identity.

A record company is using blockchain to manage the ownership of their copyrighted content. The company requires that every time one of their songs is used for commercial purposes, all the parties involved in creating it receive a set percentage of a royalty fee.

How can a blockchain help track the royalty fees?


by granting regulators access to the blockchain


by creating a smart contract to calculate party royalties


by setting specific permissions for content usage


by using consensus to determine royalties
A blockchain can help track the royalty fees by creating a smart contract to calculate party royalties.

How does blockchain support data privacy?


Blockchain’s primary purpose is to restrict access to data.


Blockchain’s primary purpose is to limit which organizations receive data.


Blockchain’s primary purpose is to share data among multiple organizations and some platforms provide data privacy features.


Blockchain's primary purpose is to only be used by a single organization, thus supporting data privacy.
Blockchain’s primary purpose is to share data among multiple organizations and some platforms provide data privacy features.

In 2019, an E. coli outbreak was traced from ground beef sold at a nationwide supermarket chain. This created fear in the consumers’ minds, leading to hesitation in consuming ground beef.

How might a Multi-party Systems strategy help prevent a similar situation from occurring in the future?


by allowing the source of tainted beef to be identified and prohibiting its sale


by lowering the price of beef in the market to compensate for lost sales


by halting the sale of all beef products regardless of source


by shutting down slaughterhouses for a certain period

A Multi-party Systems strategy might help prevent a similar situation from occurring in the future by allowing the source of tainted beef to be identified and prohibiting its sale. By using blockchain, all parties involved in the supply chain can be tracked, facilitating the identification of the specific supplier or source of the issue.

What is Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems?


helping a single company develop a data ingress platform


consulting on new technologies for investment purposes


helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value


developing a messaging solution between two companies

Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems is helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value. Accenture's Multi-party Systems Practice focuses on using blockchain and other distributed ledger technologies to create trust and collaborate effectively across multiple parties, allowing ecosystems to reimagine their business processes and create new value.

A company wishes to begin the process of implementing a Multi-party System and is looking for other companies with similar interests to join them. With blockchain, every organization sees the same data.

What does this provide?


intent


uniqueness


trust


ownership

This provides trust. Blockchain provides a secure and shared digital ledger where each participant has access to the same information, making the transactions transparent and trustworthy for all parties involved.

Accenture is helping a retail company increase efficiency in the management of customer transactions, payment processing, and answering customer queries using Machine Learning. The client uses blockchain technology to share data with their wholesale suppliers, delivery service providers, and customer organizations.

How would the client benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model?


Blockchain will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data.


Blockchain will ensure the automated process can still be manipulated by a human.


Blockchain will ensure the automation process is faster than centralized databases.


Blockchain will ensure only admins can modify the data being sent to the Machine Learning model.

The client would benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model because it will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data. By using blockchain to facilitate data sharing among all parties involved in the supply chain, the data used to train the Machine Learning model is more consistent and up-to-date.

An e-commerce company is collaborating with artisans from all over the world to sell the artisans' products. Accenture is helping this client build a platform that will maintain the integrity of the artisans' credentials by creating digital identities for them. This creates a privacy-preserving link between the products and the artisan's unique identities.

How will these digital identities help these artisans?


by linking them with the banks to prove credit-worthiness and informing them of loan options


by allowing them to interact with the e-commerce company and getting details of the buyer so they can target to a specific audience


by connecting them with the customers, enhancing their marketing, and building their client base


by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values such as sustainability and labor practices

These digital identities will help these artisans by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values such as sustainability and labor practices. By creating a digital identity for each artisan, the e-commerce company can track and verify the source of the products, ensuring that the materials and production methods meet the expectations of the buyers. This helps to build the reputation of each artisan and their brand while also providing buyers with increased transparency and confidence in the products they are purchasing.

A pharmaceutical company is using blockchain to manage their supply chain. Some of their drugs must be stored at a lower temperature throughout transport so they installed RFID chips to record the temperature of the container.

Which other technology combined with blockchain would help the company in this situation?


Internet of Things (IoT)


Cloud Computing


Intelligent Apps


Artificial Intelligence (AI)

The other technology combined with blockchain that would help the company in this situation is Internet of Things (IoT). By combining blockchain with IoT, the pharmaceutical company can create a secure and transparent record of the temperature and location data of the drugs being transported, ensuring that they remain at the correct temperature throughout the entire supply chain. Additionally, by using IoT sensors, the company can track other important factors such as humidity, pressure, and light exposure, creating a comprehensive and reliable record of the entire supply chain.

What sets blockchain solutions apart from conventional record-keeping solutions?


a system that maintains rigor and complexity


a focus and priority on bitcoin and cryptocurrency


the ability for multiple parties to be certain they are using the same data


the ability to share different versions of the same data to multiple parties

The ability for multiple parties to be certain they are using the same data sets blockchain solutions apart from conventional record-keeping solutions. In a blockchain system, all parties share and have access to the same data in a secure and transparent manner, creating trust among the participants without the need for a centralized authority to manage the data flow. This provides a level of transparency and immutability that conventional record-keeping solutions cannot match.
